communityWork.title: Founder
communityWork.organization: Little Food Cabinet Moment Sri - Lanka
communityWork.description: Founded an initiative to combat poverty and hunger by providing accessible, non-perishable food items in community hubs. The program emphasizes community support, self-sufficiency, and strengthening community bonds to offer long-term solutions to poverty and hunger.

communityWork.title: Editorial Director
communityWork.description: Leading a publication dedicated to raising awareness about human rights violations worldwide through investigative reporting. The journal highlights cases of injustice, provides a platform for marginalized voices, and ensures stories of oppression are not overlooked, fostering accountability and inspiring action.

communityWork.title: Provincial Coordinator
communityWork.description: Leading environmental initiatives focused on sustainability and conservation. Coordinating projects addressing deforestation, pollution, and climate change, working with local communities, government bodies, and NGOs to implement green practices, raise awareness, and advocate for policy changes.

communityWork.title: Member
communityWork.description: Representing and addressing community needs and concerns. Jana Sabha is a grassroots platform for civic engagement, collaborating to identify and solve local issues from infrastructure to social welfare. Ensuring transparent governance and advocating for residents' rights and interests.
